name: @everme/agent-sdk
description: Shared core for EverMe AI-agent plugins. HTTP client, search/context, agent-memory writes, redaction, prompt helpers. Host-agnostic — paired with @everme/openclaw, @everme/claude-code, @everme/memory-mcp, …

scripts.test: node --test tests/client.test.js tests/config.test.js tests/messages.test.js tests/agent-memory.test.js tests/personal-memory.test.js
